metadata.name: Set Up Geotargeting for a Campaign

description: A manager for a local business wants to run ads that only target users within a 10-mile radius of their store.

nodes.task_description: Find the campaign to be updated.
In the location targeting settings, select 'radius targeting'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent navigates to the correct setting.

nodes.task_description: Enter the store's address and set the radius to 10 miles.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully defines the geographic target area.
